title: SpotLight Proteomics: uncovering the hidden blood proteome improves diagnostic power of proteomics.
author: Lundstrom SL Zhang B Rutishauser D Aarsland D Zubarev RA
content: S-EPMC5294601 PMC5294601 SpotLight Proteomics: uncovering the hidden blood proteome improves diagnostic power of proteomics. The human blood proteome is frequently assessed by protein abundance profiling using a combination of liquid chromatography and tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS). In
